text:
There once was a girl named Willow.

Willow dreamed big. She loved to dance.

One day, Willow caught her favorite songbird stealing fruits from her tree.

The bird?

It was a raccoon.

Willow chased the raccoon away.

Frustration turned into friendship.

Together they danced under moonlit skies.

Willow learned racoons weren’t so scary after all.

Officially.

That was years ago.

Now, Willow teaches music.

She makes even more friends.

That night, she dreamed her music could soar.

And she went sailing.

Away.

Just dancing.

Just the two of them.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
